UNCAPPEDSPIRE-ANIMATION_BATCH_SIZE.title: Animation Batch Size
UNCAPPEDSPIRE-ANIMATION_BATCH_SIZE.hover:
Batches large consecutive instant animations between 0.1 second intervals to stop crashing.
If your game is crashing due to animation stacking, lower this number.
